description: Fetch a merge request (IID) from GitLab REST v4. Set include_notes to also return discussion notes (comments); optional page/per_page apply only when include_notes is true.

project.description: Project ID or URL-encoded path (e.g. numeric id, or group/subgroup/repo for gitlab.com).

merge_request_iid.description: Merge request IID (per-project number from the MR URL).

include_notes.description: When true, also fetch notes (comments) for this merge request.

page.description: Page of notes when include_notes is true (GitLab pagination).

per_page.description: Notes per page when include_notes is true (GitLab pagination).
